快3计划方案快3计划群【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239142226_64872871<br>vk.com/topic-239183481_66211406<br>vk.com/topic-239218491_66211408<br>vk.com/topic-239153715_64467319<br>vk.com/topic-239178433_64719239<br>vk.com/topic-239226416_64872872<br>vk.com/topic-239153785_64467322<br>vk.com/topic-239218347_65994988<br>vk.com/topic-239218353_64719240<br>vk.com/topic-239183221_66211411<br>vk.com/topic-239183347_65994991<br>vk.com/topic-239226394_64549007<br>vk.com/topic-239218560_65616381<br>vk.com/topic-239183228_65061971<br>vk.com/topic-239183335_64467326<br>vk.com/topic-239183551_66211414<br>vk.com/topic-239183272_65161240<br>vk.com/topic-239142209_65342162<br>vk.com/topic-239183252_65161241<br>vk.com/topic-239218360_65616382<br>vk.com/topic-239213519_65342164<br>vk.com/topic-239205175_64467328<br>vk.com/topic-239218402_65161243<br>vk.com/topic-239149239_65342165<br>vk.com/topic-239218357_65994997<br>vk.com/topic-239142232_65161246<br>vk.com/topic-239218455_64467329<br>vk.com/topic-239149163_64719245<br>vk.com/topic-239183434_64549012<br>vk.com/topic-239149194_64549013<br>vk.com/topic-239170366_64872880<br>vk.com/topic-239226407_65994963<br>vk.com/topic-239183491_66211417<br>vk.com/t
